main.version: v1.4 The Long Vigil (3-act campaign, deck drafts/scars, villain Nul, relic cards)

coop.version: v1.0 Twin Vigils (linked duels, same seed, status sync + beacons)
coop.build: same assets + coop-logic.js as logic.js + index.html with window.__COOP__=true (see scratchpad build step; rebuild: sed title/__COOP__ into index.html, cp coop-logic.js logic.js)

primary_hosting.platform: Vercel (project ashenmoor, account tuitamogamer-7851), static, linked to the GitHub repo — every git push auto-deploys; manual: vercel deploy --prod --yes
primary_hosting.note: Solo + campaign fully work here. Twin Vigils co-op needs the Higgsfield game kernel.

backup_hosting.note: GitHub Pages mirror (solo + campaign only). Update: git add -A && git commit && git push.

outage_2026-07-16: Higgsfield account hit 0 credits (free plan) -> both game URLs serve 'ok' placeholder and ALL deploy_game calls (update AND create) fail with generic error. Fresh zips are uploaded to CDN (media ids 25ea0070... main / a98e8219... coop) — once credits are topped up, redeploy is a single deploy_game call per game with the stored game_id.
note: To update either game: zip, media_upload, PUT, media_confirm(file), deploy_game WITH that game_id. Never omit game_id on update.
